personalInfo.title: Personal information
personalInfo.subtitle: Update how you appear across {{brandName}}. Your email is managed by your organization.
personalInfo.bioPlaceholder: A short bio for your teammates…

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.subtitle: Choose how {{brandName}} looks on this device.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.subtitle: Control emails and digests. Changes apply to this account only.
notifications.productUpdatesDesc: Occasional news about features and improvements.

changePassword.title: Change password
changePassword.subtitle: Signed-in users can update the password here. Requests include your organization scope.
changePassword.errorTooShort: New password must be at least 8 characters.

signOut.title: Sign out everywhere
signOut.subtitle: End this session on this browser. You can sign in again anytime.

avatarTooLarge.title: Image too large
avatarTooLarge.description: Please use a file under 1.4 MB.
